hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】“WarshGPT”：华尔街如何适应美联储的新沟通时代；【FINANCE】达拉斯联储主席洛根呼吁“适度”提高利率；【AI】将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法。

items.title: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication
items.summary: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.
items.title_zh: “WarshGPT”：华尔街如何适应美联储的新沟通时代
items.summary_zh: 投资公司正在为迎接美联储公开评论较少的时代做好准备。有些人依靠人工智能来获得优势。

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.summary: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.
items.title_zh: 达拉斯联储主席洛根呼吁“适度”提高利率
items.summary_zh: 这位政策制定者表示，本周的通胀好消息还不够好。

items.title: A better way to turn 2D designs into 3D models for rapid prototyping
items.summary: Researchers developed an automated framework that helps AI models generate CAD programs more accurately and efficiently.
items.title_zh: 将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一个自动化框架，帮助 AI 模型更准确、更高效地生成 CAD 程序。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
items.summary: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.
items.title_zh: Saylor 的策略将现金储备增加至 32 亿美元，但比特币持有量保持不变
items.summary_zh: 该公司连续第二周保持比特币持有量稳定，选择利用筹集的资金增加现金以支付优先股股息。

items.title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Texas AI campus with second $9.8B lease as IREN signs $2.8B in contracts; shares climb double digits
items.summary: Hut 8 and IREN shares climb on fresh AI data center deals worth billions as the bitcoin-to-AI pivot continues to accelerate.
items.title_zh: 随着 IREN 签署 2.8B 美元的合同，Hut 8 以第二次 9.8B 美元的租赁将 1 GW 德克萨斯州人工智能园区完全商业化；股价攀升两位数
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币向人工智能的转型持续加速，Hut 8 和 IREN 的股价因价值数十亿美元的新人工智能数据中心交易而攀升。

items.title: Strategy sells $263.5 million in MSTR shares, buys no bitcoin as USD reserve tops $3.2 billion
items.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for around 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth roughly $54.7 billion.
items.title_zh: Strategy 出售价值 2.635 亿美元的 MSTR 股票，未购买比特币，因为美元储备已突破 32 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Strategy 持有的比特币总量约占 2100 万枚比特币供应上限的 4%，价值约 547 亿美元。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
items.summary: Tuesday evening's second-quarter earnings report is the perfect stage to do just that.
items.title_zh: 第一资本在 Discover 上下了大赌注。现在必须证明这场赌博是值得的
items.summary_zh: 周二晚上的第二季度收益报告是实现这一目标的完美舞台。

items.title: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.summary: Speculators think in the company's second quarter earnings report, it will show trading volume fell for a third consecutive quarter.
items.title_zh: 市场预测称Coinbase交易结果可能达不到预期
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，在该公司第二季度财报中，将显示交易量连续第三个季度下降。

items.title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
items.summary: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场利用世界杯，Kalshi 增加了 300 万新用户
items.summary_zh: 预测市场推出了一些以足球运动员为主角的广告，并建立了合作伙伴关系，在比赛期间在更多地方展示其品牌。

items.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
items.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.
items.title_zh: 沃伦参议员表示，特朗普的 CFPB 改革让美国人损失了 265 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 表示，特朗普政府取消 CFPB 规则和执行，迄今为止已给美国人造成高达 265 亿美元的损失。

items.title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
items.summary: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.
items.title_zh: 银行家们纷纷召开投资者会议，Anthropic 距离大型 IPO 又近了一步
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 正准备在 10 月份潜在的 IPO 之前召开投资者会议，这家人工智能初创公司希望在公开市场上击败竞争对手 OpenAI。

items.title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
items.summary: Some protesters demanding education reforms said they were injured in clashes with police who banned the march.
items.title_zh: 警方阻止数千名“蟑螂”抗议者向印度议会游行
items.summary_zh: 一些要求教育改革的抗议者表示，他们在与禁止游行的警察发生冲突时受伤。

items.title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.summary: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.summary_zh: 巴勒斯坦武装组织驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表接替了 2024 年在加沙被以色列军队杀害的叶海亚·辛瓦尔 (Yahya Sinwar)。

items.title: Another U.S. Service Member Is Killed as Iran War Expands
items.summary: The Pentagon said a service member was killed in northern Iraq while troops disposed of an Iranian drone. It also said “unidentified remains” were found in Jordan, where an earlier attack had left two soldiers dead and another missing.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争扩大，另一名美国军人被杀
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼表示，一名军人在伊拉克北部被杀，当时部队处置了一架伊朗无人机。报告还称，在约旦发现了“身份不明的遗骸”，该国早些时候的一次袭击导致两名士兵死亡，另一名士兵失踪。

items.title: Hamas Names Khalil al-Hayya as Its New Leader
items.summary: Seen as closer to Iran, Khalil al-Hayya served as the Palestinian militant group’s chief negotiator with Israel and the Trump administration during the Gaza war.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新领导人
items.summary_zh: 哈利勒·哈亚被视为与伊朗关系更密切，在加沙战争期间担任巴勒斯坦激进组织与以色列和特朗普政府的首席谈判代表。

items.title: Spain Celebrates Both a Soccer Win and a Sense of Wider Success
items.summary: For many fans, the World Cup victory cemented a belief that something promising — a cultural, economic and sports revival — is happening in the country.
items.title_zh: 西班牙庆祝足球胜利和更广泛的成功感
items.summary_zh: 对于许多球迷来说，世界杯的胜利坚定了一种信念，即该国正在发生一些有希望的事情——文化、经济和体育的复兴。

items.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
items.summary: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.
items.title_zh: Exodus 将在支付转移中裁员 25%
items.summary_zh: 此次重组是该公司收购 Monavate 和 Baanx 后构建全栈支付平台战略的一部分。

items.title: Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September
items.summary: Major banking heavyweights join a massive blockchain network test that will allow retail consumers to trade tokenized won freely across commercial lines.
items.title_zh: 韩国央行准备在 9 月份与 9 家银行进行实时 CBDC 交易
items.summary_zh: 主要银行业巨头加入了大规模的区块链网络测试，该测试将允许零售消费者在商业领域自由交易代币化的韩元。

items.title: Crypto market slips even as equities advance. Pump surges on social-media chatter
items.summary: With a Fear and Greed index pointing solidly at "fear," crypto prices drifted lower even as stock index futures rose. PUMP's 20% surge was the only real headline in an otherwise quiet session.
items.title_zh: 即使股市上涨，加密货币市场也会下滑。社交媒体热议带动人气飙升
items.summary_zh: 由于恐惧和贪婪指数坚定地指向“恐惧”，即使股指期货上涨，加密货币价格也会走低。 PUMP 的 20% 飙升是原本平静的会议中唯一真正的头条新闻。

items.title: AI-assisted hacking is outpacing traditional code reviews, NEAR co-founder says
items.summary: NEAR co-founder Polosukhin called formal verification a necessary shift for securing blockchain code from AI hacking.
items.title_zh: NEAR 联合创始人表示，人工智能辅助黑客攻击的速度正在超过传统的代码审查
items.summary_zh: NEAR 联合创始人 Polosukhin 称形式化验证是保护区块链代码免受人工智能黑客攻击的必要转变。

items.title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
items.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.
items.title_zh: Benchmark 在裁员 25% 后支持 Exodus，称稳定币支点被忽视
items.summary_zh: 周五下午晚些时候，Exodus 表示，预计重组将带来 1000 万至 1300 万美元的年化成本节省。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #115.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 115 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: ADI (ADI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #74.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：ADI (ADI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 74。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Lorenzo Protocol (BANK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #229.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：洛伦佐协议（BANK）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 229 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pump.fun (PUMP)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #77.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pump.fun (PUMP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 77。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.title_zh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Helping AI models to meet the real world
items.summary: Through research and entrepreneurship, Professor Devavrat Shah is helping to design methods that can handle constant decision-making using limited computational resources.
items.title_zh: 帮助AI模型满足现实世界
items.summary_zh: 通过研究和创业，Devavrat Shah 教授正在帮助设计能够使用有限的计算资源处理持续决策的方法。

items.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
items.summary: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.
items.title_zh: 卡尔达诺“Van Rossum”硬分叉的内部及其对用户意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 周六，Van Rossem 硬分叉将卡尔达诺移至版本 11。这是卡尔达诺社区第一次对升级进行投票，而不是构建它的公司。

items.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
items.summary: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 减缓了以太币购买速度，回购了价值 8600 万美元的股票
items.summary_zh: 该公司上周仅增发了 7,430 个 ETH，价值约 1400 万美元，接近其垄断以太坊 5% 供应量的目标。

items.title: A bitcoin 'volmageddon' may be brewing, key indicator suggests
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 20, 2026
items.title_zh: 关键指标表明比特币“暴动”可能正在酝酿
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 20 日天气预报

items.title: Hyperliquid plans to add decentralized prediction markets in upgrade to HIP-4
items.summary: Permissionless prediction markets will become available first on testnet and later on mainnet, Hyperliquid said.
items.title_zh: Hyperliquid 计划在升级到 HIP-4 时添加去中心化预测市场
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 表示，无需许可的预测市场将首先在测试网上开放，然后在主网上开放。

items.title: Bitmine expands Ethereum treasury to 5.78 million ETH, repurchases 5.5 million shares
items.summary: Bitmine expanded its ether treasury to 5.78 million ETH and repurchased 5.5 million shares under its $4 billion buyback program.
items.title_zh: Bitmine将以太坊库存扩大至578万ETH，回购550万股
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 将其以太坊库存扩大至 578 万 ETH，并根据其 40 亿美元的回购计划回购了 550 万股股票。

items.title: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin ‘vibe-codes’ anonymous billboard demo with onchain moderation on Aztec
items.summary: Vitalik Buterin "vibe-coded" an anonymous billboard demo on Aztec with onchain moderation, a censor role, and a local LLM flagging daemon.
items.title_zh: 以太坊联合创始人 Vitalik Buterin 在 Aztec 上使用“vibe-codes”匿名广告牌演示进行链上审核
items.summary_zh: Vitalik Buterin 在 Aztec 上“振动编码”了一个匿名广告牌演示，具有链上审核、审查角色和本地 LLM 标记守护进程。

items.title: TD Cowen cuts Smarter Web Company price target 36% on revised bitcoin outlook
items.summary: TD Cowen cut Smarter Web's price target to £0.64 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing revised bitcoin forecasts and treasury assumptions.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 因修改比特币前景而将 Smarter Web Company 目标价格下调 36%
items.summary_zh: TD Cowen 将 Smarter Web 的价格目标下调至 0.64 英镑，同时维持买入评级，理由是修改了比特币预测和财务假设。

items.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
items.title_zh: 长视野模型时代的安全性和对准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了部署长期运行的人工智能模型的经验教训，强调了新的安全风险、观察到的故障以及通过迭代部署改进的保障措施。

items.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
items.title_zh: 为什么青少年应该获得安全的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过适合年龄的保护、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作伙伴关系，让 ChatGPT 对青少年来说更安全。

items.title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
items.title_zh: 更新型号，同样的优势

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
items.title_zh: 模型路由很简单。直到它不是。

items.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.
items.title_zh: 通过两项 Google Vids 更新创建、编辑视频并为其加注星标
items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Google Vids 中的个人头像让视频创作变得比以往更容易。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
items.summary: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.
items.title_zh: 中国汽车市场将迎来2021年以来最糟糕的一年销量暴跌20%
items.summary_zh: 继 2025 年销量创历史新高 2370 万辆之后，中国消费者对汽车的需求大幅下降。

items.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
items.summary: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.
items.title_zh: 印度今年最大规模的 IPO 在机构狂热的推动下吸引了价值 310 亿美元的投标
items.summary_zh: 印度最大资产管理公司的IPO于周四结束，引起了机构投资者的浓厚兴趣。

items.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
items.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
items.title_zh: 由于 SpaceX 股价跌破 IPO 价格，卖空者纷纷买入
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 称，目前约有 1.85 亿股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占该公司可公开交易流通股的 29%。

items.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
items.summary: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国空袭伊朗是为了“纪念”阵亡美国士兵
items.summary_zh: 伊朗以对叙利亚和约旦的袭击作为回应，据报道两艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡爆炸。

items.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.
items.title_zh: 也门胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”
items.summary_zh: 胡塞武装表示，禁运立即开始，是对沙特封锁也门港口和机场的回应。

items.title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.summary: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击造成十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 地方当局称，仅 7 月份，俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击就造成 28 人死亡。

items.title: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
items.summary: The parents of the four naturally-conceived girls were taken by "immense surprise" with the pregnancy, the hospital said.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚诞生罕见同卵四胞胎
items.summary_zh: 医院表示，这四名自然受孕女孩的父母对怀孕感到“非常惊讶”。

items.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.summary: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.title_zh: 臭名昭著的贩毒集团头目伊斯梅尔·赞巴达在美国监狱被判处终身监禁
items.summary_zh: 被称为“El Mayo”的锡那罗亚贩毒集团联合创始人在承认向美国运送大量毒品后也被勒令支付 150 亿美元。

items.title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
items.summary: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.
items.title_zh: 13岁男孩在西班牙世界杯庆祝活动中去世
items.summary_zh: 萨拉曼卡罗德里戈城一座喷泉部分倒塌，另外两名年轻人受伤。

items.title: Scores feared dead after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
items.summary: Sixty-seven people have been rescued but the ferry is thought to have had more than 130 people on board.
items.title_zh: 客轮在圭亚那倾覆后可能造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 目前已有 67 人获救，但渡轮上据信载有 130 多人。

items.title: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
items.summary: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.title_zh: 纽卡斯尔、利物浦和英格兰传奇人物基冈去世
items.summary_zh: 前英格兰队队长兼主教练凯文·基冈在透露自己被诊断出患有第四期癌症七周后去世，享年 75 岁。

items.title: In Venezuela’s Rubble, a Search for the Family Pets
items.summary: Volunteers are reuniting pets with families, offering Venezuelans comfort amid loss and devastation.
items.title_zh: 在委内瑞拉的废墟中寻找家庭宠物
items.summary_zh: 志愿者正在帮助宠物与家人团聚，为遭受损失和破坏的委内瑞拉人提供安慰。

items.title: Israel’s Ambassador to U.N. Lashes Out at Mamdani Over Netanyahu Arrest Threats
items.summary: The “threat is empty,” the ambassador, Danny Danon, said in an address to the U.N. General Assembly.
items.title_zh: 以色列驻联合国大使就内塔尼亚胡逮捕威胁猛烈抨击马姆达尼
items.summary_zh: 大使丹尼·达农在联合国大会上发表讲话时表示，“威胁是空洞的”。

items.title: Suspected Iranian strikes have targeted U.S. military in at least four countries.
items.title_zh: 疑似伊朗袭击的目标是至少四个国家的美军。

items.title: Inside the Deadly U.S. Airstrike on a Shadow Fleet Tanker
items.summary: Evidence suggests the ship on which three Indian sailors died was not moving when it was struck in the Gulf of Oman, but it had been engaged in risky offshore transfers of oil.
items.title_zh: 美国对影子舰队油轮的致命空袭
items.summary_zh: 有证据表明，造成三名印度水手死亡的这艘船在阿曼湾被击中时并没有移动，但它一直在进行危险的海上石油运输。

items.title: Outcry in Italy After Man Dies While Being Restrained by Police
items.summary: The death of the man, a Moroccan resident of Italy, set off an outcry across the country and prompted comparisons to the death of George Floyd in the United States.
items.title_zh: 意大利男子被警察拘束身亡后引发强烈抗议
items.summary_zh: 这名居住在意大利的摩洛哥人的死亡在全国范围内引发了强烈抗议，并引发了人们将其与美国乔治·弗洛伊德之死进行比较。

items.title: Aiming for My Fastest Marathon, I Turned to Distance Running’s Mecca
items.summary: A New York Times reporter’s quest to beat the personal best he set 14 years ago took him to a Kenyan village, where the biggest benefit he got was not what he expected.
items.title_zh: 为了跑出最快的马拉松，我转向长跑圣地
items.summary_zh: 《纽约时报》的一名记者为了打破 14 年前创下的个人最好成绩，来到了肯尼亚的一个村庄，在那里他得到的最大好处却出乎他的意料。

items.title: Burnham Set to Become Britain’s First Openly Roman Catholic Prime Minister
items.summary: Andy Burnham has spoken of Catholicism as part of his cultural identity rather than as a fervent religious faith.
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆将成为英国首位公开信奉罗马天主教的首相
items.summary_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 将天主教视为他文化身份的一部分，而不是一种狂热的宗教信仰。

items.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
items.summary: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.
items.title_zh: 随着 Hut 8 和 IREN 签订数十亿美元新合同，人工智能计算股反弹
items.summary_zh: 在投资者质疑新数据中心容量的需求后，这些交易引发了人工智能计算股的反弹。

items.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
items.summary: The framework will address critical issues like official ownership records, private key custody, transaction reversibility and system liability.
items.title_zh: 巴西证券监管机构成立特别工作组，并在 60 天的期限内提出代币化提案
items.summary_zh: 该框架将解决官方所有权记录、私钥保管、交易可逆性和系统责任等关键问题。

items.title: Former NY Governor Cuomo joins OKX board, touts 24/7 tokenized trading
items.summary: Andrew Cuomo said OKX could help bring round-the-clock trading and more international capital into U.S. markets.
items.title_zh: 前纽约州州长 Cuomo 加入 OKX 董事会，宣扬 24/7 代币化交易
items.summary_zh: 安德鲁·科莫表示，OKX 可以帮助将全天候交易和更多国际资本引入美国市场。

items.title: Bernstein lifts Robinhood target to $160, sees prediction markets revenue overtaking crypto
items.summary: Bernstein raised its Robinhood price target to $160, citing prediction markets, Rothera, and Robinhood Chain as key revenue drivers.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 将 Robinhood 目标提高至 160 美元，预计预测市场收入超过加密货币
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 将 Robinhood 的目标价格提高至 160 美元，称预测市场、Rothera 和 Robinhood Chain 是主要的收入驱动因素。

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HIP-4 to support permissionless deployment for outcome markets
items.summary: HIP-4 deployers must stake 500,000 HYPE tokens and can take up to 50% fees on their validator-aligned markets.
items.title_zh: Hyperliquid 的 HIP-4 支持成果市场的无需许可部署
items.summary_zh: HIP-4 部署者必须质押 500,000 个 HYPE 代币，并且可以在其验证者联盟市场上收取高达 50% 的费用。

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.title_zh: 人工智能时代的记分卡
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 推出了实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。

items.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
items.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.
items.title_zh: Cars24 如何利用 OpenAI 扩展对话并加快构建速度
items.summary_zh: Cars24 使用 OpenAI 支持的语音和聊天代理来处理每月超过 100 万分钟的对话时间，恢复 12% 的丢失线索，并为整个公司的团队带来代理工作流程。

items.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.
items.title_zh: GPT-Red：释放自我完善的稳健性
items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI 的自动化红队系统 GPT-Red，该系统使用自我对弈来提高 AI 安全性、对齐和提示注入的稳健性。

items.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
items.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
items.title_zh: 代理时代如何管理人工智能投资
items.summary_zh: 了解企业如何通过衡量每美元的有用工作、提高效率和扩展高价值工作流程来管理代理时代的人工智能投资。

items.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 销售团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work
items.summary_zh: 了解销售团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work 根据实际工作输入创建管道简报、会议准备包、预测审查、客户计划和停滞交易诊断。

items.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 数据科学团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work
items.summary_zh: 了解数据科学团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work 根据实际工作输入构建根本原因简报、影响读数、KPI 备忘录、范围分析和仪表板规范。

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
items.title_zh: 德国电信如何利用人工智能重新布线电信
items.summary_zh: 德国电信如何通过 OpenAI 成为一家人工智能原生电信公司——改变客户服务、员工工作流程、网络运营和语音的未来。

items.title: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge
items.title_zh: Cosmos 3 Edge 简介

items.title: Security incident disclosure — July 2026
items.title_zh: 安全事件披露 — 2026 年 7 月

items.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
items.title_zh: Shippy 的建造教会了我们关于建筑代理的哪些知识

items.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines
items.title_zh: 欢迎来自 Thinking Machine 的 Inkling

items.title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
items.title_zh: 真实世界 VoiceEQ 简介：测量语音 AI 的人类质量

items.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
items.summary: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.
items.title_zh: 将更多应用程序连接到搜索
items.summary_zh: 您将能够直接在 AI 模式下安全地链接您的首选服务并与之交互。

items.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
items.summary: Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.
items.title_zh: 庆祝视觉搜索创新 25 周年
items.summary_zh: Google 图片即将迎来 25 岁生日。以下是一些重要里程碑的回顾，以及探索和创建视觉内容的新方法。

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: Following the questions where they lead
items.summary: Assistant Professor Bailey Flanigan has arrived at complex computational methods for helping democracy thrive.
items.title_zh: 追随问题的引导
items.summary_zh: 助理教授贝利·弗拉尼根 (Bailey Flanigan) 找到了帮助民主蓬勃发展的复杂计算方法。

items.title: 3 Questions: Neural transparency and the future of AI design
items.summary: Assistant Professor Pat Pataranutaporn describes a new interface that lets everyday users glimpse inside an AI's neural network before their chatbot ever says a word.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：神经透明度和人工智能设计的未来
items.summary_zh: 助理教授帕特·帕塔拉努塔蓬 (Pat Pataranutaporn) 描述了一种新界面，可以让日常用户在聊天机器人说一句话之前就了解人工智能的神经网络内部情况。

items.title: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
items.summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以建造喷气发动机吗？贾维斯挑战赛测试人工智能副驾驶在高难度技术工程中的作用
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生设计、建造并测试了带有人工智能副驾驶的喷气发动机，评估人工智能在开发高性能航空航天系统中的有用性。

items.title: How MIT students are helping to prevent cyberattacks
items.summary: Students from the MIT Cybersecurity Clinic help local governments and other vulnerable organizations defend against digital threats.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生如何帮助防止网络攻击
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院网络安全诊所的学生帮助地方政府和其他脆弱组织抵御数字威胁。

items.title: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data
items.summary: “SceneSmith” system uses collaborative AI agents to create realistic 3D environments of places like kitchens, hotels, and living rooms, where robots can simulate everyday chores.
items.title_zh: 人工智能代理创建虚拟游乐场来帮助机器人获得关键的训练数据
items.summary_zh: “SceneSmith”系统使用协作式 AI 代理来创建厨房、酒店和客厅等场所的逼真 3D 环境，机器人可以在其中模拟日常家务。
